CVE-2024-33918.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Maxim K AJAX Login and Registration modal popup + inline form allows Stored XSS.This issue affects AJAX Login and Registration modal popup + inline form: from n/a through 2.23.
